name: NexCampus v2.3.8
changelog: Global search bar — type to find any tool, press Enter to navigate directly
Mind map fixed — canvas rendering with proper theme colors
Code Lab sidebar tab switching fixed
README rewritten with full feature list, screenshots, and build instructions

Procedural planet textures, atmospheric glow, lens flare for Solar System
Neon Tokyo + Midnight Purple themes (8 total)
Seamless self-update — one click, fully automatic
